ModMetaData.name: Pawn Diary: Rimpsyche
ModMetaData.author: aimmlegate
ModMetaData.description:
Connects Rimpsyche's personality model and conversations to Pawn Diary.
Three layers work independently: - Rimpsyche conversations and their social afterfeel are routed into dedicated diary themes. Ordinary conversation becomes an ambient day note, while an unusually charged exchange can stand alone. - Each modeled colonist contributes a compact, localized psyche line to diary prompts: only the strongest plain-language traits, plus up to two interests. Raw personality numbers never enter the prompt. - Two default-on settings can let Rimpsyche shape a source-owned diary outlook and record charged conversation outcomes. Turning the outlook setting off releases every override owned by this bridge; it never writes back into Rimpsyche.
Requires Pawn Diary and Rimpsyche - Personality Core. The bridge is inert if Rimpsyche is not active.
